```{r}

pacman::p_load("tidyverse", "janitor", "lubridate","stringr","forcats", "openxlsx", "tidyr")

# Use cleaning protocol first  


#create email list of students 

Student_List <- April26 %>%
  filter_out(Affiliation=="Faculty/Staff") %>% 
  select(`Campus Email`) %>% 
  distinct(`Campus Email`)
 
  
write.xlsx(Student_List,"C:/Users/asokol/OneDrive - University of South Carolina/StudentLife/Data/GE Monthly email lists/GEMonthly Email List Apr 2026 20260501.xlsx", overwrite = T)

```
